title: Rapanea dependens
taxonomy: Rapanea dependens is classified as a species within the family Myrsinaceae. It belongs to the genus Rapanea and is commonly known as the mountain pepper tree. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf structure and flower morphology. The family Myrsinaceae includes a diverse range of plants, many of which are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Through its classification, scientists can better understand the evolutionary relationships between different species within the family.

The plant is reported to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal uses.
